treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Ausar — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Remove the suffering from doubt, confusion, and anxiety over not knowing the why behind events in our lives.
Not knowing what to do in a challenging situation.
Gaining Divine guidance on your path in life.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being. Endowed with the ability to directly receive guidance from God.
Since it has been medically proven that knowing nurtures peace, I seek refuge from stress in the Words of God.

Most people cannot intuit the truth that the universe was created by an all-knowing, and powerful being, and seeing that the world has been designed with interest in the well-being of all, I place my life in the hands of God, for my salvation.
Thank you for enabling me the ability to earn the privilege of a personal union with you, to have the light of your wisdom shine on the path of my life.
Thank you for designing a world where the more that I do for others is the more that I do for myself . . wisdom of love!
From this day on, my cup runs-over with the waters of life and I am raising it higher, and higher each and every day.
Verily! I win when I work for others to win as well.

Why should I not bless strangers and transgressors? Have I not received unasked-for blessings? Did I earn all of the good things that came my way? God has given to me through others and asked for nothing in return. I give thanks for God's love for me by showering others with my love.
